newsItems.title: Started as a Researcher at the Center for AI in Healthcare, Seoul National University Bundang Hospital.
Won the 1st prize at the Global Data Convergence Talent Prog. Showcase hosted by Ministry of Science & ICT and IITP.
Heading to Suzhou to present at the EMNLP 2025 Main Conference. (Come check out my poster!)
Won the Excellence Award at the LLM Clinical Note Challenge organized by Seoul National University Bundang Hospital.
Accepted to Handbook on AI and Strategy (Edward Elgar Publishing), with Prof. Prithwiraj Choudhury and Do Yoon Kim.
newsItems.linkText: Handbook on Artificial Intelligence and Strategy

newsItems.title: Started as a Research Assistant with Prof. Minkyung Kim and Prof. Meng Liu at CMU Tepper.
Started as a Visiting Researcher at CMU School of Computer Science (S3D Department)
